'''Tsukkia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tsukkia system/Legends|Tsukkia system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] and housed the manufacturer of [[Tsukkian water freighter]]s.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1988-XX-XX -->''[[Star Wars Campaign Pack]]''
